data.title: How talk of a TikTok ban changed video commerce platform Orme's direction
data.description: Talk of a TikTok ban — and the app going dark in January — left a void for video commerce platforms like Orme to try to fill.

data.title: What January's Baird/Digital Commerce 360 Ecommerce Stock Index results showed
data.description: Beyond, Carvana and Instacart were among the ecommerce index's strongest performers to kick off 2025.

data.title: JCPenney takes on a new digital gig: B2B ecommerce
data.description: With the launch of this B2B platform, JCPenney is positioning itself to diversify its revenue streams and adapt to evolving market demands.

data.title: B2B marketplace Auto Hauler Exchange secures $5 million to expand
data.description: AHX says its platform, which supports over 5,000 carriers and more than 350 shippers, eliminates the need for intermediaries, allowing carriers to select shipments while shippers set their prices.

data.title: Ciranda launches ecommerce platform for B2B food ingredient buyers
data.description: The platform provides access to ingredient information, order placement, documentation, and other account management functions.
